summary: Iteration 70: Mobile UX Fixes Desktop Regression Testing Complete. All 6 critical/high mobile fixes verified to NOT break desktop experience. No horizontal scroll detected on any page (Homepage, Login, Market, Advisor, Alerts). All responsive grid breakpoints (sm:, md:) working correctly - grids show multiple columns on desktop.

issues: Tutorial modal persists after login - blocks cognition tabs view. User needs to dismiss manually. Not a regression from mobile fixes.

desktop_regression.homepage_stats_grid: PASS - All 5 stat blocks visible in single row (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-5)
desktop_regression.login_form_visible: PASS - Email/password inputs visible and functional
desktop_regression.market_page_signal_scores_grid: PASS - 4 signal score cards in row (md:grid-cols-4)
desktop_regression.advisor_page_loads: PASS - BIQc Insights page visible (behind tutorial modal)

css_fixes_verification.overflow_x_hidden_root: VERIFIED - DashboardLayout.js line 159: overflow-x-hidden on root div
css_fixes_verification.overflow_x_hidden_global: VERIFIED - index.css lines 976-979: html, body { overflow-x: hidden; max-width: 100vw; }
css_fixes_verification.responsive_grid_breakpoints: VERIFIED - MarketPage.js uses grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3/4 patterns
css_fixes_verification.44px_touch_targets: VERIFIED - index.css lines 1012-1018: @media (max-width: 639px) buttons get min-height: 44px
css_fixes_verification.cognition_tabs_scroll_indicator: VERIFIED - AdvisorWatchtower.js line 198: sm:hidden gradient fade div

mobile_css_fixes_applied: overflow-x: hidden on root containers (DashboardLayout.js, index.css)
Responsive grid breakpoints (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3) on 15+ grids
44px touch targets on action buttons (CSS media query for max-width: 639px)
Cognition tabs scroll indicator with gradient fade (sm:hidden)
Global mobile CSS: reduced motion, safe areas, scrollbar-hide, font minimum
desktop_not_broken: Homepage stats grid shows 5 columns on desktop (md:grid-cols-5)
Market page signal scores grid shows 4 columns (md:grid-cols-4)
No horizontal scroll on any page at 1920x1080 viewport
All navigation, buttons, and interactive elements work

critical_code_review_comments: Mobile fixes use sm:/md: breakpoints that only activate on mobile viewports - desktop completely unaffected as intended
Cognition tabs scroll indicator (gradient fade) has sm:hidden class - only shows on mobile, invisible on desktop
Touch target 44px minimum is inside @media (max-width: 639px) - only applies to mobile
OBSERVATION: Tutorial modal on Advisor page blocks content but is not related to mobile fixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile UX fixes verified to not break desktop. All pages tested at 1920x1080 desktop viewport show no horizontal scroll. Grid layouts use responsive breakpoints correctly. Tutorial modal on Advisor page is a pre-existing UX issue not related to mobile fixes.
